violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register a certified food safety manager with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The ice machine was turned off and emptied during the time of inspection. Establishment is to clean and sanitize equipment and allow to air dry prior to returning unit to service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Raw shellfish, beef tartare, and hamburgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Establishment stated that the menus will be sent to reprint prior to service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Breakfast parfaits, cut fruit, and chia seed pudding packaged in the food establishment for the cafe area are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The floor tiles and grout in the kitchen were observed cracked, missing, and with low joint seams and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2026
The kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and construction dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

Inadequate lighting observed the walk-in freezer. Lighting levels must be sufficient enough to enable employees to perform certain functions such as reading labels, discerning the color of substances, recognizing the condition of food, utensils, and supplies; and safely conducting general food establishment operations and clean-up. Properly distributed light makes the need for cleaning apparent by making accumulations of soil conspicuous. Per contractor, parts are on order to install light fixture in walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The door to the toilet room (near pool) is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
